# Paseka

> Decentralized event-driven AI agent swarm for solo developers. Configure bees via YAML, prompt templates, and bus event contracts (SIGNAL, INSIGHT, MUTATION, VERIFICATION).

Colony work lives in a git repo under `.paseka/`. Machine secrets stay in `~/.config/paseka/<slug>/`. Use the guides below (or the full corpus) to configure roles without reading Go source.

## Agent configuration (start here)

- [Bee role YAML](https://russ-p.github.io/paseka/010-bee-config/): schema for `.paseka/bees/<role>.yaml` — adapter, prompt_template, command, post_exec, routing, completion
- [Prompt templates](https://russ-p.github.io/paseka/004-prompt-templates/): `.paseka/prompts/`, text/template context, emit partials
- [Bee event routing](https://russ-p.github.io/paseka/008-bee-routing/): subscribes / publishes, Reactor, task vs direct dispatch
- [INSIGHT kinds](https://russ-p.github.io/paseka/009-insight-kinds/): insight taxonomy and `{{.Insights}}` projection
- [Architecture (colony layout)](https://russ-p.github.io/paseka/003-architecture/): `.paseka/` layout, adapters, worktrees

## Full corpus

- [llms-full.txt](https://russ-p.github.io/paseka/llms-full.txt): concatenated agent-config docs for single-fetch context

## Optional

- [Glossary](https://russ-p.github.io/paseka/002-paseka-glossary/): bee-language vocabulary
- [CLI](https://russ-p.github.io/paseka/007-cli/): `paseka bee run` / `bee chat`, event emit
- [Task ledger](https://russ-p.github.io/paseka/005-task-ledger/): traceId / taskId / agentId
- [Product brief](https://russ-p.github.io/paseka/001-brief/): choreography model overview
- [Interactive sessions](https://russ-p.github.io/paseka/006-interactive-sessions/): HITL `bee chat`, SessionAdapter, Ghostty attach
